ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., Electricity, Water, Natural Gas) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit of the material (e.g., kWh, gal, MMBtu) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Energy, Water, Gas) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the resource (e.g., Grid, Renewable, Non-renewable) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the resource per unit */,
  "environmental_impact" REAL /* Environmental impact of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology used in production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of technology (e.g., Electrolysis, Reforming) */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the technology */,
  "cost_per_kg" REAL /* Cost of producing 1 kg of output using the technology */,
  "environmental_impact_score" REAL /* Environmental impact score of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being consumed */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology used */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Nameplate capacity of the technology in kg/yr */,
  "consumption_per_unit" REAL /* Consumption per unit of resource */,
  "consumption_per_km" REAL /* Consumption per km per kg of resource */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total consumption of the resource for the given year and technology */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the resource consumption */,
  "environmental_impact_value" REAL /* Total environmental impact of the resource consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity log */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the log */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the technology in kg/yr */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the technology capacity */,
  "environmental_impact_value" REAL /* Total environmental impact of the technology capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_logs_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report is generated for */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total consumption of resources for that year */,
  "total_capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of resources for that year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of resource consumption for the year */,
  "total_environmental_impact" REAL /* Total environmental impact of resource consumption for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "sustainability_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metric is calculated */,
  "sustainability_score" REAL /* Sustainability score based on resource consumption */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of resource consumption for the year */,
  "total_environmental_impact" REAL /* Total environmental impact of resource consumption for the year */,
  "cost_efficiency_score" REAL /* Cost efficiency score of resource consumption */,
  "environmental_efficiency_score" REAL /* Environmental efficiency score of resource consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sustainability_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Production, Finance, Sustainability) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "threshold_exceeded" INTEGER /* Indicates if a consumption threshold was exceeded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Threshold Exceeded, System Error) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
